name: User
description: Authenticated actor — container whose morphisms grant owned-workspace access edges. No special ontological status.

name: ColliderAdmin
description: Category administrator — elevated actor with governed OWNS edges to assigned containers.

name: SuperAdmin
description: Root administrator — transitive OWNS over all containers.

name: AppTemplate
description: Template container — reusable subgraph pattern. Instantiation = ADD + LINK sequence.

name: NodeContainer
description: General-purpose container — default object in C. Payload in state_payload JSONB.

name: AgnosticModel
description: LLM/ML model container — provider-agnostic URN. Provider config in state_payload.

name: SystemTool
description: Tool container — discovered via graph traversal, exposed via MCP protocol surface.

name: UI_Lens
description: UI rendering surface — functor output: containers × wires → React component tree.

name: RuntimeSurface
description: Execution surface — HTTP/WS/MCP endpoint. Tools wire here to become executable.

name: ComputeResource
description: GPU device, Docker container, thread pool, VM — schedulable resource container.

name: ProtocolAdapter
description: WS channel, MCP session, gRPC stream, HTTP endpoint — routable communication container.

name: InfraService
description: Postgres instance, disk volume, network segment — persistable infrastructure container.

name: MemoryStore
description: Vector embedding store, context window, conversation history — ephemeral or persistent memory container.

name: PlatformConfig
description: Platform distribution configuration — paths, store mode, build targets. Typed representation of distribution.json entries.

name: WorkstationConfig
description: Workstation environment descriptor — OS, runtime ports, optional services. Typed representation of workstation.json entries.

name: Preference
description: Runtime preference — key-value wire_config with scope (system/workspace/user/session). Typed representation of preferences.json entries.

name: Provider
description: LLM/AI provider container — adapter_type, API config, rate limits. OWNS model containers (OBJ06). Typed representation of providers.json entries.

name: BenchmarkSuite
description: Named benchmark collection — groups BenchmarkTask entries. Definition object, immutable after creation.

name: BenchmarkTask
description: Individual benchmark task definition — prompt template, expected morphisms, difficulty. Immutable after creation.

name: BenchmarkScore
description: Benchmark result record — model’s scores on a task within a suite. Immutable once recorded. Sources MOR14/15/16.

name: AgentSpec
description: Agent specification container — model binding, tool routing, state sync. The configured persona that acts on behalf of a User.

name: OWNS
description: Ownership edge — automatic transitive propagation.

name: CAN_HYDRATE
description: Hydration permission — declared transitivity controlled by manifest/wire_config.

name: PRE_FLIGHT_CONFIG
description: Runtime configuration — sets initial state before activation.

name: SYNC_ACTIVE_STATE
description: State synchronization — surface pushes current state to container.

name: ADD_NODE_CONTAINER
description: Create + wire container into ownership tree.

name: LINK_NODES
description: General-purpose wiring — creates edge with specified port types.

name: UPDATE_NODE_KERNEL
description: Kernel-level state update.

name: UNLINK_EDGE
description: Remove wire. Container persists. May create orphan nodes. (Renamed from DELETE_EDGE in v2 to align with §3 canonical NT name.)

name: CAN_SCHEDULE
description: Workload allocation — kernel/admin schedules work to compute resource.

name: CAN_ROUTE
description: Transport selection — protocol adapter routes traffic.

name: CAN_PERSIST
description: Storage routing — container persists state through infra.

name: CAN_FEDERATE
description: Cross-instance communication — morphism bundle exchange between mo:os instances.

name: CAN_FORK
description: Branch parallel exploration — fork active state graph into GPU VRAM for parallel DAG scoring.

name: SCORED_ON
description: Model achieved this benchmark score. New in v3 — cross-provider mapping (§9).

name: EVALUATES_TASK
description: Score applies to this task definition. New in v3 — cross-provider mapping (§9).

name: BENCHMARKED_BY
description: Score belongs to this benchmark suite. New in v3 — cross-provider mapping (§9).

name: ADD
description: ∅ → Container

name: LINK
description: C × C → Wire

name: MUTATE
description: C → C

name: UNLINK
description: Wire → ∅

name: FileSystem
description: Import functor — reads manifest.yaml and creates/reconciles LINK morphisms.

name: UI_Lens
description: Render functor — maps containers and wires to XYFlow component tree.

name: Embedding
description: Embed functor — maps container payloads to pgvector embeddings.

name: Structure
description: GPU pre-analysis functor — adjacency matrix ops, spectral analysis, DAG compression.

name: Benchmark
description: Classifying functor — maps providers to points in metric space via published benchmark values. Pre-image F⁻¹(threshold) yields equivalence classes of interchangeable providers. Multiple benchmark lenses (intelligence, speed, price) compose as product functor ∏_i F_i defining provider identity.

name: C
description: Universal graph category — all containers and wires.

name: Coslice(A)
description: Fan-out from A — coslice category of outgoing morphisms.

name: Slice(A)
description: Fan-in to A — slice category of incoming morphisms.

name: Scoped(W)
description: Full subcategory — W and its OWNS-transitive closure.

name: Kernel
description: Kernel post-dispatch unified view — all providers merge here.

name: C_0
description: Stratum S0 subcategory — authored, pre-validation.

name: C_1
description: Stratum S1 subcategory — validated, admissible.

name: C_2
description: Stratum S2 subcategory — materialized, graph-ready.

name: C_3
description: Stratum S3 subcategory — evaluated, contingent.

name: C_4
description: Stratum S4 subcategory — projected, never ground truth.

name: Authored
description: Hydration stage 0 — authored input domain.

name: Validated
description: Hydration stage 1 — validated, schema-checked.

name: Materialized
description: Hydration stage 2 — materialized morphism programs.

name: Projected
description: Hydration stage 4 — projected views and surface bindings.

name: Evaluated
description: Hydration stage 3 — evaluated contingent state.

name: R_1536
description: Embedding vector space — codomain of FUN03.

name: Manifest
description: Manifest file category — domain of FUN01.

name: React
description: React component category — codomain of FUN02.

name: DAG
description: DAG category — codomain of FUN04.

name: Provider_p
description: Per-provider subcategory — domain of benchmark functor FUN05.

name: Met
description: Metric space category — codomain of benchmark functor FUN05. Each model maps to a point; equivalence classes [P]_F partition providers by capability profile.

name: Adapter
description: Protocol adapter category — request/response transport.
